guardrail: static projection of the public register; no facts added here

data.name: CH -> UK (CHF->GBP directed edge)
data.feasibility_class: Regime-in-transition (destination regime adopted, not yet operative; resolves to Category I at 2027-10-25)

infrastructure_overlap.note: Both ends on Project Agora (CH and UK).

inbound_mechanism.test: FCA conduct + BoE systemic regime (adopted; operative 2027-10-25)

scheduled.basis: FSMA 2000 (Cryptoassets) Regulations 2026, SI 2026/102 (made 2026-02-04; preparatory provisions 2026-02-25; full commencement 2027-10-25), at which point the Bank of England systemic-stablecoin regime and the FCA conduct regime become operative.

class_basis.instrument: FSMA 2000 (Cryptoassets) Regulations 2026, SI 2026/102 (made 2026-02-04; preparatory provisions 2026-02-25; full commencement 2027-10-25), at which point the Bank of England systemic-stablecoin regime and the FCA conduct regime become operative.
